display.name: Falling Snow
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Snowflakes drifting slowly past the camera through a quiet winter night, the only motion when the music pulses.

annotation.technical_notes: A textured ribbon-like custom wave, rendered with a high-contrast noise pattern, undulates across a dark void. High decay in the feedback loop prevents persistent trails, maintaining a stark monochrome aesthetic. In the latter half, a particle system of instanced snowflake textures drifts across the viewport, likely triggered by a temporal threshold or audio event.
